rules.Patriarch: Your army may only include one model with the Patriarch keyword.
rules.Poor Maintenance: In each of your Command Phases, roll a d6 for each unit with this rule in your army. On a 1, the unit must decide if it will Move or Shoot this turn. o If elected to Move, it may Advance and Fall Back this turn but cannot Shoot or Charge. o If elected to Shoot, it may Shoot in the Shooting Phase, but cannot Move, Advance, Charge, or Fall Back. o High Altitude models MUST always move, and can never opt to Shoot instead of Move because of Poor Maintenance. Spells The Following Spells are listed here to avoid redundancy throughout the Codex. Spell +5 points Mass Hypnosis Target unit cannot fire Cast 5+ Overwatch until your next Psychic Phase. Spell +10 Psychic Stimulus 18 Target unit may Declare points Cast 7+ Charges even if it Advanced this turn until your next Psychic Phase. Spell +15 Mind Control The Cast Value is the target points Cast Target W+ non-Titanic model’s remaining Wounds. This model immediately performs its Melee or Ranged attacks against one of its friendly units, but not itself. Spell +15 Undermine Target unit may only Move, points Cast 7+ Advance, Charge, and Fall Back at half speed until your next Psychic Phase. The same unit cannot be affected by more than one instance of Undermine at a time. Spell +40 Might From Target unit gains S+1 until your points Beyond next Psychic Phase. Cast 7+ Spell +50 Undying Vigor Target unit gains a 5+ Feel No points Cast 7+ Pain until your next Psychic Phase.
